name: Antigravity

form_factor.comment: Google Antigravity IDE plus standalone agy CLI (plugin layout, rules, skills, hooks, MCP). Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://antigravity.google/docs/cli-getting-started; IDE: https://antigravity.google/download.

released_in.comment: IDE public release in 2025; standalone agy CLI documented May 2026.

latest_major_update.comment: CLI plugin system and IDE agent surfaces updated together in current docs.

rules.comment: Full plugin rules on CLI; IDE has persistent agent context with overlapping rules support. Location: Antigravity plugin rules live in plugin folders; workspace/global IDE rule storage is managed by Antigravity.

skills.comment: Plugin skills on CLI; IDE local data includes skills with less public doc detail. Location: plugin skill folders containing `SKILL.md`.

mcp_servers.comment: CLI plugin mcp_config.json; IDE also ships MCP configuration. Location: plugin `mcp_config.json` files and IDE/CLI MCP configuration.

custom_commands.comment: CLI via plugin capabilities; IDE via global workflows rather than classic slash-command folders. Location: command-like behavior is via plugins/workflows rather than a documented standalone command folder.

model_selection.comment: IDE model UI exists; agy --help does not expose a model flag as of this dataset.

approval_mode.comment: CLI supports --dangerously-skip-permissions; IDE approval behavior not fully documented.

continue.comment: CLI --continue for latest conversation; IDE continues from existing history.

custom_model_provider.comment: No arbitrary provider configuration found in public CLI help/docs.

notes: Google Antigravity spans an agentic IDE and the agy CLI. Distinct from deprecated Gemini CLI. No published programmatic SDK.

pricing.value: Free (generous weekly rate limits), Google AI Pro/Ultra (undisclosed), Organization (consumption-based via Google Cloud)
pricing.comment: Free tier includes Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, 3 Flash, Claude Sonnet & Opus 4.6, gpt-oss-120b. Pro/Ultra tiers offer more generous rate limits.

transcripts.comment: Location: Antigravity brain/trajectory summaries are under `~/.gemini/antigravity/brain/<uuid>/*.md`; index data is in `~/Library/Application Support/Antigravity/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`.
